cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello Sir, this is a marketing call from Jio Payments Bank. Achha, I'm calling to inform you about a pre-approved credit card offer, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Who is this? How did you get my number? Thik hai, I don't recall applying for any credit card.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Ma'am Kuldip Kaur, your profile was shortlisted based on our internal criteria. You can visit our official website or download the Jio Payments Bank app to apply, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds good. But how do I know this is not a scam? Can you give me some more information about the offer, Sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Absolutely, ma'am. The credit card offers 5% cashback on all purchases, and the annual fee is waived for the first year. You can check all the details on our website, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That sounds interesting. But I'll apply online myself. Can you just confirm your name and the bank's website, please, Sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: My name is Rohan, and the website is www.jiopaymentsbank.com. You can also download our app from the play store, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Alright, got it. I'll check the website and apply if I'm interested. Thanks for letting me know, Sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, ma'am. Have a great day, and I hope you'll consider our offer, ji.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 114s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: Marketing Call for a Pre-approved Offer: Agent calls to inform the user about a real, pre-approved credit card or personal loan offer and explains the features and legitimate application process.
